x4freetext: Stacks consisting of two self-supporting targets
of yttrium (100 ug/cm2) separated by aluminum foils
Three irradiations were carried out for each
such stack of target and degraders encompassing the
beam energy between 70 and 87 MeV for 12-C.
The irradiation time of around 2 hours was
selected according to the half-lives of the
radioisotopes produced. The total charge collected for

It is half of target thickness. The energies
